@leofang  and @kmaehashi for review and recommendations. nvmath is recent and I didn't know about it. 
While this package may be promising, is in the beta stage. I also tried another nvidia package `cunumeric` and it didn't support windows and was not going to.
CuPy bindings are `cdef`d, this is why `pxd` exports needed. Bubbling up from native calls and derouting over python makes the whole process noticeably slower (I'd say ~2x), it is not negligible.
I used cupy with pxd for a few years. It works really well. The interface is stable and usable. It is also multiplatform, much smaller than nvmath and works with existing cuda/cublas installation. 
You guys did a great job.","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/cupy/cupy/issues/comments/2359873179/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"performed_via_github_app":null}}

NVIDIA offers many packages I'm not sure letting one package influence a decision for using one particular is a good idea. They serve for different purposes and audiences. Using cupy have been a best strategy for me for quite a while and I hoped to help extending cupy ability with pdx files similar to `scipy` . 

> How about using cythonize(..., include_path=['/path/to/cupy_source_tree'])

Currently, I just have copied pdxes inside the installed cupy from the respective source for more than 3 years and it works well. The pdx correspond to the I can use a cupy source tree with the same result. This makes it significantly more complex to deploy from sources though, as I need to carry two source trees, and adds moving parts.

I understand the change may be unwelcomed by some reasons and may probably search for another package. There are not many which have such native interface and well maintained. A switch from cupy to nvmath would take me a few months due to another workloads.

If you don't think this is a reasonable addition, feel free to reject the PR.","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/cupy/cupy/issues/comments/2361926845/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"performed_via_github_app":null}}
